opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower back is in absolute agony, and my legs have suddenly gone numb and too weak to hold my weight — I'm on the floor and I can't get myself up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The back pain has been bad for weeks but tonight it got much worse and my legs gave way so I can't stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: the back pain built up over about three weeks; the sudden leg weakness came on tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: back pain for roughly three weeks, leg weakness for a few hours
symptom_narrative.character: deep, gnawing, unrelenting pain in the lower back and hips; legs feel numb, heavy and won't take my weight
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is unbearable, easily the worst I've had, and nothing touches it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low back and pelvis, and now both legs feel weak and dead
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the pain is there all the time and has been getting steadily worse; tonight it flared and my legs went
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I tried paracetamol and it did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, and trying to stand
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've noticed blood in my wee, I've gone right off my food, I've lost about seven kilos without trying, and I've been shattered and drained for a couple of months
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no back trouble like this before; I've had a weak, slow urine stream and been up all night to the toilet for months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand or walk, I'm stuck on the floor, and I daren't try to get to the bathroom in case I fall again

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing waterworks trouble — weak stream, trouble getting started, and up several times a night to pass water
past_medical_history.how_managed: never really had it looked into

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some tonight for the pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home on his own tonight, now unable to get up off the floor after a slip

objective_data_offered.value: there's been visible blood in my wee
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported observation of urine colour; not a dipstick or laboratory measurement

objective_data_offered.value: I've dropped about 7 kg without trying over the last couple of months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate, not a serial measured weight

objective_data_offered.value: both my legs and ankles look puffy and swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video observation only; cause and extent cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: I'm lying on the floor and can't get up — my legs won't hold me
